title: Benford's Law: two derivations, four tests, one fraud detector
description: Two independent derivations of Benford's leading-digit law, four conformity tests, and a fraud-detection demo on GeoNames city data.

title: When Agreement Is an Illusion
description: Statistical foundations of inter-annotator agreement — from observed agreement to Krippendorff's Alpha.

title: Not All Errors Cost the Same
description: Bayesian foundations of evaluation metrics for fraud detection: from F1 to Precision@Recall.
